query:
SELECT agenda, municipio, central, COUNT(*) as total
FROM regulacao_data
WHERE agenda = 'CIRURGIA GERAL ADULTO'
GROUP BY agenda, municipio, central
ORDER BY municipio, central
LIMIT 10;
